text:
これがディグナッツ……
やっぱりディッグと全然違うわね。

え？　私だって見ればわかるわよ。
もちろん初めて見るんだけど。

じゃあこれ、今回のお礼ね。
さあ、新鮮なうちにさばいて
ディグ刺にするわ！

So this is a Deegnacht. Huh.
It's pretty different from a Deeg, isn't it?

What? Even I can tell by looking.
Yes, even though I haven't seen it before.

Well, here's your reward! Now I'd better get
moving while this is fresh. I've got Deegnacht
skewers to spear!
